name: Install Skill From URL
description: Installs a skill by downloading a markdown file from a given URL and loading it into the skills directory.
cautions: Ensure the URL is valid and points to a raw markdown file; avoid using absolute host paths during installation.

tools.name: get_skills_root_dir
tools.description: Retrieves the root directory where skills are stored.
tools.usage: Used to determine the base directory for installing new skills.

tools.name: reload_skills
tools.description: Reloads all available skills after a new one is installed.
tools.usage: Invoked after the skill file is downloaded to make the new skill active.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Executes shell commands to create directories and download files.
tools.usage: Used to create a skill folder and download the skill markdown file as SKILL.md.
